episodes.title: My Journey from a Satanic Cult and Childhood Abuse to Hope
episodes.description: In this episode of A Colourful Past Podcast, host Danny Shannon interviews speaker and advocate Jason Bligh, who shares his harrowing life story. Conceived through rape and subjected to horrific physical and sexual abuse by his brain-injured mother, Jason discusses the systemic failures of child protection services in New Zealand and Australia. Jason details his rock bottom at age 30, which led him to rehab for alcohol addiction and a journey toward radical forgiveness. Now a corporate speaker and child advocate, Jason explores the "hero's journey," the importance of self-authorship, and the mission to reform child safety systems to provide a better future for the next generation.
